monitor.capture_what: Location header value from the Flask Response object returned by redirect()

oracle_check.condition_description: The Location header in the redirect response contains an untrusted external URL (protocol-relative, javascript:, or explicit external http/https scheme to attacker-controlled domain), confirming no sanitization is applied to the user-provided 'next' parameter.
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_URL-REDIRECTION: open redirect bypass detected — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
